compiled_state.title: Add WORKTREE_TRACKING resume scan block to sprint/SKILL.md Auto-Resume Detection
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
930f-8991 — Auto-detect and recover single abandoned worktree branch on resume

## testing_mode
GREEN

## What
Modify `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` Auto-Resume Detection section (Phase 1, after checkpoint processing in step (d)):

Add new sub-step **WORKTREE_TRACKING Resume Scan** between the checkpoint rules and the 'After checkpoint processing, proceed to Phase 3' line:

```
**WORKTREE_TRACKING Resume Scan** (runs after checkpoint processing):
1. Enumerate tickets to scan: the top-level epic ticket + all child story/task tickets
   - Get children via: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list` filtered by parent_id = <primary_ticket_id> (open + closed)
   - Also scan the top-level ticket itself
2. For each ticket, read comments and find WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comments with no corresponding :complete (for task tickets) or :landed (for story/bug tickets)
3. For each unmatched start, extract the branch name:
   - If branch no longer exists locally: skip without error, log 'Branch <b> not found — skipping'
   - If branch is ancestor of HEAD (already merged): write retroactive :complete with outcome=already_merged, skip re-merge
   - If git is in mid-merge state (MERGE_HEAD exists): run `git merge --abort` first
   - If branch has unique commits (not in HEAD): attempt `git merge --no-edit <branch>`
     - On success: log 'Merged abandoned branch <b>'
     - On conflict: run `git merge --abort`, log 'Conflict in <b> — discarded'
4. After scan: if repo is clean, proceed to Phase 3
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 6720-39b0 structural boundary tests pass GREEN for sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Auto-Resume Detection section contains WORKTREE_TRACKING resume scan sub-step
- [ ] Scan covers top-level ticket and all child story/task tickets
- [ ] Instructions cover: branch-not-found skip, ancestor=already_merged retroactive :complete, mid-merge abort, unique-commits merge attempt, conflict=discard
